ham.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Cloud Storage Update – Oct 23, 2024
ham.body:
Dear CloudOps Team,

Please be advised that the CloudSafe Platform will undergo a mandatory security patch on Oct 23, 2024, from 22:00 UTC to 02:00 UTC. During this period, API access to all services will be briefly unavailable.

We appreciate your cooperation and apologize for any inconvenience.

Best regards,
CloudSafe IT Operations

spam.subject: ⚠️ Immediate Action Required: Your CloudSafe Account Is In Suspicious Use
spam.body:
Dear CloudSafe User,

Our security team has detected unusual login activity from an unrecognized device. To prevent a possible compromise, we must verify your account information immediately.

Please confirm your identity by clicking the link below and providing the required credentials:

<URL>

If we do not receive confirmation within 4 hours, your account will be temporarily suspended and all stored data will be purged to protect your privacy.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Security Team – CloudSafe

P.S. Verify now to avoid losing precious data.
